//: Scope: Dockerfile base-image digests + tags only. Cargo crate updates are explicitly out of scope for the BPF-2.2 Stage 4 rollout — blast radius too big to bundle. Add `cargo` to enabledManagers in a follow-up if/when desired.
//1: Per-repo rate limits keep PR storms manageable when an upstream bumps. With 12 repos pinning the same alpine + rust digests, a single upstream rebuild produces ~15 PRs across the org.

packageRules.//: Digest-only bumps (same tag, new sha) are mechanical security/CVE refreshes. Auto-merge on green CI.
Patch tag bumps (e.g. alpine:3.23.4 → 3.23.5) are similarly low-risk.
Minor/major (e.g. alpine:3.23 → 3.24, rust:1.95 → 1.96) can change behaviour; needs a human.
